titleStmt.title: SII 15.209: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 209. (B.K. No. 36 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the doorway leading to the well called Siddhara-bhāvi.

The record is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Ānanda, Chaitra-amāvāsyā, solar eclipse, Sunday. In the cyclic year Ānanda falling in the reign of Vīra-Ballāḷa, no solar eclipse occurred. A solar eclipse occurred on Chaitra-amāvāsyā of the next year, i.e., Rākshasa. Thus assuming Ānanda to be a mistake for Rākshasa, the given date corresponds to 1195 A.D., April 12. The weekday, however, was Wednesday.

It records a gift of twelve gadyāṇas to be collected annually from the contract amount (kēṇi) for maintaining a charitable �tta at Nāgarabāvi by Kēsava, son of Vishṇubhaṭṭa and Adakeyara Kēśavadēva, with the permission of the One-Thousand.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.] svasti śrī
yādavanārāyaṇaṁ nissaṁkapratāpacakravartti śrī vīraballāḷadēvavarṣada 3 neya yā
nanda saṁvatsarada caitradamāvāsye yādivāra sūryyagrahaṇa byatīpātavuḷḷamavā viśiṣṭatithiyalli supu
traṁ kuladīpakaranisida viṣṇubhaṭṭara śrī kēsavadēvanuṁ yaḍakeyara lōkōttema kēśavadēvanuṁ
śrī sāsirbaraṁ bēḍikoṁḍu nāgarabāviya dharmmētakke daḷabhōgada kēṇikāṟatanadali biṭṭa gadyāṇa 12 yī dharmmadāraveyaṁ varṣaṁprati kēṇiyaṁ koṁḍa kēṇikāṟaru naḍasuvaru Ātanī dharmma
śrī sāsirvvaru pratipāḷisuvaru
yā yētadāḷibbarigaṁ karavaḍa
hiriya taṟe sarvvabādhe parihāra .
Digital edition of SII 15.209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
